ucs.title: [LLM] RedCurl staging & exfil to legitimate cloud (Yandex.Disk / pCloud / cloud.mail.ru) via PowerShell/curl
ucs.description: Hunts RedCurl's signature corporate-espionage exfiltration pattern: post-compromise use of PowerShell or curl.exe to push collected files to attacker-controlled accounts on Russian-speaking-friendly legitimate cloud services (Yandex Disk WebDAV, pCloud, Mail.ru Cloud). This blob-over-HTTPS-to-trusted-CDN behavior is a documented RedCurl tradecraft fingerprint (Group-IB 'RedCurl.SimpleUploader' / 'RedCurl.SimpleDownloader').
ucs.splunk: | tstats summariesonly=true count min(_time) as firstTime max(_time) as lastTime values(Processes.process) as cmdline values(Processes.parent_process_name) as parent from datamodel=Endpoint.Processes where Processes.process_name IN ("powershell.exe","pwsh.exe","curl.exe","cmd.exe","wscript.exe","cscript.exe") AND (Processes.process="*webdav.yandex*" OR Processes.process="*disk.yandex*" OR Processes.process="*api.pcloud.com*" OR Processes.process="*pcloud.com*" OR Processes.process="*cloud.mail.ru*" OR Processes.process="*cloud-api.yandex*") by Processes.dest Processes.user Processes.process_name | `drop_dm_object_name(Processes)` | where match(cmdline,"(?i)(curl|Invoke-WebRequest|Invoke-RestMethod|wget|WebClient|Start-BitsTransfer|Net\.WebRequest|-Method\s+PUT|--upload-file)") | join type=inner dest [| tstats summariesonly=true count from datamodel=Network_Traffic.All_Traffic where All_Traffic.dest_category!="corp_sanctioned_cloud" AND (All_Traffic.dest="*yandex*" OR All_Traffic.dest="*pcloud*" OR All_Traffic.dest="*mail.ru*") by All_Traffic.src | rename All_Traffic.src as dest] | convert ctime(firstTime) ctime(lastTime) | sort - lastTime
ucs.kql: let suspectHosts = DeviceProcessEvents | where Timestamp > ago(7d) | where FileName in~ ("powershell.exe","pwsh.exe","curl.exe","cmd.exe","wscript.exe","cscript.exe") | where ProcessCommandLine has_any ("webdav.yandex","disk.yandex","cloud-api.yandex","api.pcloud.com","pcloud.com","cloud.mail.ru") | where ProcessCommandLine matches regex @"(?i)(curl|Invoke-WebRequest|Invoke-RestMethod|wget|WebClient|Start-BitsTransfer|Net\.WebRequest|--upload-file|-Method\s+PUT|PROPFIND|MKCOL)" | project Timestamp, DeviceId, DeviceName, AccountName, InitiatingProcessFileName, FileName, ProcessCommandLine; suspectHosts | join kind=inner ( DeviceNetworkEvents | where Timestamp > ago(7d) | where RemoteUrl has_any ("webdav.yandex.ru","cloud-api.yandex.net","api.pcloud.com","cloud.mail.ru") or RemoteIPType == "Public" and RemoteUrl matches regex @"(?i)(yandex|pcloud|mail\.ru)" | project NetTime=Timestamp, DeviceId, RemoteUrl, RemoteIP, RemotePort, InitiatingProcessFileName ) on DeviceId | where abs(datetime_diff('second', Timestamp, NetTime)) < 300 | summarize EventCount=count(), FirstSeen=min(Timestamp), LastSeen=max(Timestamp), CmdSamples=make_set(ProcessCommandLine, 5), Destinations=make_set(RemoteUrl, 10) by DeviceName, AccountName | order by LastSeen desc
ucs.rationale: RedCurl is uniquely defined by its low-and-slow corporate document theft to Russian-friendly legitimate cloud APIs — generic exfil rules to Dropbox/Mega/Google would miss them, and generic 'PowerShell + cloud' rules drown in noise. Restricting to (a) Yandex Disk/Cloud-API/WebDAV, pCloud, and Mail.ru Cloud, (b) executed via interpreters or curl, and (c) using PUT/upload/PROPFIND/WebClient verbs col

ucs.title: [LLM] RedCurl ISO/IMG/LNK spearphish chain → schtasks persistence
ucs.description: Hunts RedCurl's documented initial-access-to-persistence chain: spearphish delivers a ZIP/ISO/IMG containing a LNK, the LNK shells out to cmd/powershell which fetches a follow-on stage and immediately registers a Scheduled Task for persistence. This compressed delivery → LNK → schtasks /create sequence within minutes of mail delivery is a RedCurl signature (Group-IB reports, ATT&CK G1039 T1566.001 + T1204.002 + T1053.005).
ucs.splunk: | tstats summariesonly=true count min(_time) as mailTime from datamodel=Email.All_Email where (All_Email.file_name="*.iso" OR All_Email.file_name="*.img" OR All_Email.file_name="*.lnk" OR All_Email.file_name="*.zip" OR All_Email.file_name="*.rar") by All_Email.recipient All_Email.src_user All_Email.subject All_Email.file_name | `drop_dm_object_name(All_Email)` | rename recipient as user | join type=inner user [ | tstats summariesonly=true count values(Processes.process) as schtasks_cmd values(Processes.parent_process_name) as parent_chain min(_time) as taskTime from datamodel=Endpoint.Processes where Processes.process_name="schtasks.exe" AND Processes.process="*/create*" AND (Processes.parent_process_name IN ("powershell.exe","pwsh.exe","cmd.exe","wscript.exe","cscript.exe","mshta.exe") OR match(Processes.parent_process,"(?i)\.lnk")) by Processes.dest Processes.user | `drop_dm_object_name(Processes)` ] | eval delta_min=(taskTime-mailTime)/60 | where delta_min>=0 AND delta_min<=240 | table mailTime taskTime delta_min user dest src_user subject file_name parent_chain schtasks_cmd | sort - taskTime
ucs.kql: let mailWindow = 4h; let suspectMail = EmailAttachmentInfo | where Timestamp > ago(7d) | where FileName endswith ".iso" or FileName endswith ".img" or FileName endswith ".lnk" or FileName endswith ".zip" or FileName endswith ".rar" | join kind=inner (EmailEvents | where Timestamp > ago(7d) | where DeliveryAction == "Delivered") on NetworkMessageId | project MailTime=Timestamp, RecipientEmailAddress, SenderFromAddress, Subject, AttachmentName=FileName, NetworkMessageId; let persistence = DeviceProcessEvents | where Timestamp > ago(7d) | where FileName =~ "schtasks.exe" and ProcessCommandLine has "/create" | where InitiatingProcessFileName in~ ("powershell.exe","pwsh.exe","cmd.exe","wscript.exe","cscript.exe","mshta.exe","rundll32.exe") or InitiatingProcessCommandLine has ".lnk" | project TaskTime=Timestamp, DeviceName, AccountUpn, InitiatingProcessFileName, InitiatingProcessCommandLine, ProcessCommandLine; suspectMail | join kind=inner persistence on $left.RecipientEmailAddress == $right.AccountUpn | where TaskTime between (MailTime .. MailTime + mailWindow) | extend MinutesFromMail = datetime_diff('minute', TaskTime, MailTime) | project MailTime, TaskTime, MinutesFromMail, RecipientEmailAddress, SenderFromAddress, Subject, AttachmentName, DeviceName, InitiatingProcessFileName, InitiatingProcessCommandLine, SchtasksCmd=ProcessCommandLine | order by TaskTime desc
ucs.rationale: RedCurl is one of the few crews still leaning on container-file (ISO/IMG/ZIP) → LNK → interpreter → schtasks chains in 2024-2025 reporting; tying the mail-delivery time to a same-recipient host's schtasks /create within a 4-hour window — and only when the parent is a script interpreter or a LNK — eliminates almost all benign software-install scheduled tasks. This kill-chain join (T1566.001 → T1204
